query:
UPDATE island_guides 
SET nearbyAirports = JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Dharavandhoo Airport',
    'code', 'DRV',
    'transferType', 'Flight',
    'duration', '30-45 minutes from Male',
    'distance', 'On island',
    'description', 'Direct flights from Male (MLE) to Dharavandhoo (DRV). Fastest way to reach the island with scenic aerial views. Operated by Maldivian Air Taxi and Heli Air Maldives.'
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'name', 'Male International Airport',
    'code', 'MLE',
    'transferType', 'Ferry',
    'duration', '45-120 minutes',
    'distance', '60 km',
    'description', 'Main international airport. Fly here first, then take ferry or speedboat to Dharavandhoo.'
  )
)
WHERE slug = 'dharavandhoo-baa'
